onderhoud.name: Export compound products
onderhoud.description: Export compound products (PC, Car) and their child products as a CSV in the same format as the shop product export.

onderhoud/AdminItems/ProductManagement/S.name: Add product option attributes
onderhoud/AdminItems/ProductManagement/S.description: Injects controls to add or reload generated attribute sets (colors, sizes, materials, etc.) on the Add Product Option page.

onderhoud/Login.php.name: Auto login
onderhoud/Login.php.description: Automatically fills in username (subdomain or demo) and password (demo) on the maintenance login page.

API/Docs.name: Copy API path
API/Docs.description: Adds a copy icon next to every resource path on the API Docs page.

name: Lorem ipsum generator
description: Type e.g. Lorem20 and press Enter to generate 20 lorem ipsum words in any input or CKEditor field.
